hook.text: FROM UNITED'S ACADEMY TO THE WORLD CUP

beats.text: IQBAL WAS UNITED'S FIRST SOUTH ASIAN CHAMPIONS LEAGUE PLAYER
HE HELPED SEND IRAQ TO THEIR FIRST WORLD CUP IN 40 YEARS
HE TRAINED ALONGSIDE RONALDO AT OLD TRAFFORD
IRAQ NOW FACE FRANCE AND NORWAY IN THE GROUP OF DEATH

caption: He came through our academy, made Champions League history as a teenager, trained alongside Ronaldo — and now Zidane Iqbal is taking Iraq to the World Cup for the first time in 40 years. 🔴🌍 Against France and Norway in the group of death, this United kid could shock the world. Who do you think gets out of that group? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #mufcacademy #worldcup #iraq
